name: Story Protocol
designPattern: Structured Content / Demo Contract / Scenario Substrate

userStory.iWant: a single structured story format for component and pattern teaching
userStory.soThat: docs, demos, profile comparisons, and later scenario tooling can share one source of truth instead of drifting copies

acceptanceCriteria: A `ComponentStory` v0 shape is defined with explicit docs fields instead of one freeform description blob
A story can render a live preview in at least one canonical width using either string or Surface output
A story can describe graceful lowering for interactive, static, pipe, and accessible modes as structured fields
A story can model more than one canonical variant for the same component family
At least three canonical component families can be expressed with the v0 shape without adding bespoke per-story escape hatches
The first docs surface can render from stories without re-encoding use/avoid/lowering guidance elsewhere
backwardCompatibility: Existing showcase `ComponentEntry` records may coexist during migration, but the story protocol becomes the intended canonical teaching substrate for new docs-driven work.

inScope: Structured docs fields (summary, use, avoid, related families, lowering)

testPlan.goldenPath: Define three canonical stories (`alert`/`note`, `modal`/`drawer`, and `viewportSurface` or `navigableTableSurface`) and render them in a narrow docs surface with profile switching. Verify that the docs page, preview, and profile comparison all derive from the story record rather than duplicated prose.
edgeCases: A component family with multiple meaningful variants but low interaction complexity
A width-sensitive structured component whose value is more behavioral than decorative
testPlan.fuzzStress: Not applicable in v0. The risk is schema overfitting or underfitting, not runtime scale.
failureCases: The schema collapses back into one unstructured markdown blob
A family requires bespoke fields outside the v0 contract just to be documented honestly
The docs app must duplicate story guidance because the story record is missing critical teaching fields

estimatedComplexity.linesOfCode: ~250 lines for the first typed contract and canonical story set, plus docs wiring
estimatedComplexity.timeComplexity: O(1) per story render, excluding the component preview itself
